title: COMPLETE STARTER BEGINNER FISHING KIT SET & 10' ROD REEL FLOATS HOOKS SHOT & NET
features: Great starter set or use as additional tackle
Includes Landing net, Waggler Floats, Dinsmores Shot & Hooks
Hunter Pro HP200XR Reel with Line
description: Hunter Pro Carbon Rod & HP200XR Reel, Landing Net & Tackle Set DESCRIPTION The HP200XR reel matches the 3pc 10' carbon rod perfectly in balance and performance. A quality tackle set & landing net are included and this kit has everything to get you started or use as an addition to your existing tackle. Rod Specifications: • 10ft Hunter Pro Carbon-X 3pc Fishing Rod • Ceramic line guides for smooth casting and prolonged line life • Quick-screw brushed aluminium adjustable reel mounts • Anti-reflective matt black colour • Medium-fine action • Weighs only 220g • Protective cloth bag included Reel Specifications: • HUNTER PRO HP200XR Reel • Complete with 6lb line • Line keeper • Lightweight & Strong Graphite Body • Carbon Black Colour • Left or right hand folding balanced handle (interchangeable) • Silent anti-reverse • Precision engineered 5.1:1 gearing • Precision 'Anti-Twist' line roller • Deep graphite spool with Chrome plating • Corrosion Resistant • Adjustable Front Drag • Balanced Rotor Tackle Specifications: • Dinsmore 4 section not toxic shot selection • WSB 10pc eyed Hooks • Roddarch 5pc Waggler float set • Roddarch Folding landing net
